holdings.infoBox: ELFY is an equity ETF with a total of 110 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sterling Infrastructure stock at 1.75%, Vicor at 1.58%, Applied Optoelectronics at 1.47%, Powell Industries at 1.44%, and Bloom Energy at 1.42%.

overview.description: The ALPS Electrification Infrastructure ETF (ELFY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap companies benefiting from electrification, focusing on sectors aligned with the transformation to electrical power. Holdings are selected by market-cap and equally weighted within the portfolio. ELFY was launched on Apr 9, 2025 and is issued by SS&C.
